subcodes.first_line: We have verily sent forth the breezes of Our verses unto all regions; among the people are they who were stirred and turned unto God, the Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ارسلنا نفحات الایات الی کل الجهات من الناس من اهتز و اقبل الی الله رب
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @chastisement and requital, @station of the Manifestation of God
